feedback.text: Hello, The current lack of policy for a product I have purchased, and which I can no longer access which was sold to me as a product - and not as a limited time service - is a travesty. Imagine purchasing (not renting or licensing) a movie, a book or a piece of music, and some organization taking your product away for no good reason. This is what publishers are currently doing to video games. As a EU citizen I would appreciate if the EU would consider prevent video games to be destroyed forever through the lens of corporate greed.
